app.name: Web Teleprompter
app.title: Web Teleprompter
drop.hint: Drop a .txt file to import the script
toast.enterScriptFirst: Please enter your script in Settings first
toast.speechUnsupported: Speech recognition is not supported in this browser. Please use Chrome / Edge
toast.readFailed: Import failed: could not read the file
speech.unsupported: Speech recognition is not supported in this browser (use Chrome / Edge)
panel.scriptHint: You can also drag a local .txt file anywhere on the page to import it as the script.
panel.speechHint: Speech following: speak the script and the text auto-scrolls to center on what you are reading/saying. Pauses and rephrasings are handled automatically; use the mouse wheel while scrolling to fine-tune up/down (offset is kept).
panel.breakWords: Break English words at line end (wrap to next line)
panel.readLineHint: The current reading position aligns to this line; while presenting you can also drag the read line in the floating window to adjust it.
panel.floatHint: In floating mode, drag the title bar to move and the bottom-right corner to resize; window-fullscreen fills the main area; screen-fullscreen enters browser fullscreen.
prompter.title: Teleprompter
prompter.readLineGrip: Drag to adjust the read line
prompter.dragHandle: Drag to move the floating window
